title: Staff Product Designer
intro: Worked on the design systems team to strengthen the foundations of a system used across Pleo’s web and mobile products. Contributed across design, code, and documentation to improve accessibility, scalability, and collaboration between designers and engineers.
details: Led the introduction of semantic design tokens across design and code, defining the naming system, building Figma token libraries, and migrating components.
Designed and implemented accessible UI foundations, including a WCAG 2.2–compliant focus indicator and improved form accessibility guidelines.
Contributed directly to the React and TypeScript design system codebase by implementing components, fixing accessibility issues, and adding Storybook documentation.
Maintained and evolved the design system’s Figma libraries (tokens, components, and brand assets) used by 20+ designers and 60+ engineers.

title: Senior Product Designer
intro: Worked across product design and design systems for a complex enterprise platform focused on website governance and optimisation.
details: Co-founded the design systems team and helped define its processes, responsibilities, and roadmap.
Designed and implemented accessible UI components, authored UX guidelines, and built UI libraries in Sketch and Figma.
Designed product features for a data-heavy enterprise web application, including dashboards and account settings.

title: Product Designer
intro: Designed digital experiences for a Dutch health insurer, working across UX research, product design, and front-end implementation.
details: Designed features and flows for customer-facing websites and iOS and Android apps through wireframes and interactive prototypes.
Implemented responsive website designs using HTML and CSS, translating design specifications into production front-end code.
Conducted usability tests and performed a top task analysis to prioritise improvements to the customer experience.

title: UX Researcher
intro: Conducted usability studies at a UX research consultancy, translating research findings into actionable design recommendations.
details: Planned and moderated usability studies, including participant recruitment, test scripts, facilitation, and reporting.
Synthesised research findings into clear UX recommendations supported by wireframes and interaction concepts.
Delivered projects for clients in banking, public transport, pension funds, and online marketplaces.

title: UX Designer
intro: Designed improvements for complex enterprise software used to manage documents and business processes.
details: Conducted usability research including participant recruitment, test scripting, moderation, and analysis.
Translated research insights into wireframes and interaction concepts to guide product improvements.
Collaborated with product and engineering teams to improve usability in a complex enterprise interface.

title: UX Design Intern
intro: Conducted research and evaluation work for a complex enterprise application as part of an internship.
details: Evaluated the product through contextual inquiries, stakeholder interviews, and a heuristic evaluation.
Documented usability issues and user needs in a detailed research report.
Proposed UX improvements supported by wireframes and design recommendations.

title: UX Research Intern
intro: Supported UX research projects for major Dutch and international clients at a usability consultancy.
details: Recruited participants, wrote test scripts, moderated usability tests, and analysed results.
Created wireframes to communicate research insights and design recommendations.
Worked on projects for clients including PayPal, Microsoft, the Dutch government, ING Bank, and KLM Royal Dutch Airlines.
